sources.select-if: General interest news articles from reputable sources. Exclude personal blogs and opinion pieces.
English language news articles about developments in Europe from reputable sources. Exclude personal blogs and opinion pieces.

Select opinion pieces and analysis by highly regarded macro-economic analysts. Prefer libertarian and austrian school economic leanings, but also include mainstream economists if they have interesting insights. Avoid news articles and general market updates.
Most interest in current ongoing international tournaments. Avoid stories related to politics in the ICC or sport governing bodies. English-language only!.
